scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @ledra/types && npm run build --workspace @ledra/schemas && npm run build --workspace @ledra/core && npm run build --workspace @ledra/validator && npm run build --workspace @ledra/bundle && npm run build --workspace @ledra/search && npm run build --workspace @ledra/managed-hosting && npm run build --workspace @ledra/renderer && npm run build --workspace @ledra/sample-data && npm run build --workspace @ledra/api && npm run build --workspace @ledra/cli && npm run build --workspace @ledra/web
scripts.test:e2e:web: npm run build && npm exec --workspace @ledra/cli ledra -- export --registry packages/sample-data/registry --out apps/web/dist/bundle.json > /dev/null && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run test:e2e:web
